name: write_bmm
full_help:
write_bmm

Description: 
Write a bmm file

Syntax: 
write_bmm  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
The name of the bmm file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Overwrite existing BMM file.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Design bmm file
              Values: A filename with alphanumeric characters and .bmm 
              extension.

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
